keyboardInteraction.action: Moves focus to the next focusable element in the tab order.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element in the tab order.
Closes the dialog and returns focus to the trigger element.
keyboardInteraction.context: When focus is inside an open dialog.

ariaAttribute.description: Applied automatically by the <button> element. Only set explicitly when using a non-button element as a button.
Set to 'true' when the button is non-interactive. Preferred over the HTML disabled attribute when the button should remain focusable for screen reader discoverability.
Provides an accessible name for icon-only buttons that lack visible text. Not needed when a visible label is present.
Indicates whether a controlled element (menu, dialog, tooltip) is currently expanded or collapsed. Set dynamically when the controlled element opens and closes.
Set to 'true' when the button is in the loading state. Communicates to assistive technology that the button's action is in progress.

colorContrastEntry.context: Label text on primary button background in light mode.
Label text on danger button background in light mode.
Secondary button border and text against the default page background.
Primary body text on the default background surface in light mode.

keyboardInteractions.action: Moves focus to the next focusable element in the tab order.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element in the tab order.

ariaAttributes.description: Applied automatically by the <button> element. Only set explicitly when using a non-button element as a button.
Set to 'true' when the button is non-interactive. Preferred over the HTML disabled attribute when the button should remain focusable for screen reader discoverability.
Provides an accessible name for icon-only buttons that lack visible text. Not needed when a visible label is present.
Set to 'true' when the button is in the loading state. Communicates to assistive technology that the button's action is in progress.

colorContrast.context: Label text on primary button background in light mode.
Secondary button border/text against the default page background in light mode.
Label text on danger button background in light mode.

focusBehaviors.behavior: Participates in the normal tab order; does not trap or redirect focus.
Focus moves to the opened element — the modal or popover component owns that move.

reducedMotion.behavior: Replaced with a static ellipsis indicator.

focusBehavior.behavior: Focus moves to the error summary.

reducedMotionEntry.behavior: Replaced with a static ellipsis indicator.
